rows.question: What is the password policy?
rows.answer: Based on policy documents: All production passwords must be at least 14 characters, rotated every 90 days, and never shared in plaintext over chat or email. Security incidents must be acknowledged in 15 minutes, triaged in one hour, and escalated to the on-call incident commander.

rows.question: What are AI release guardrails?
rows.answer: Based on policy documents: Every AI release requires unit tests, model evaluation above threshold, AI security tests, and manual production approval. Security incidents must be acknowledged in 15 minutes, triaged in one hour, and escalated to the on-call incident commander.

rows.question: How long are support logs retained?
rows.answer: Based on policy documents: Customer support logs are retained for 180 days. Financial audit records are retained for 7 years under compliance policy. Security incidents must be acknowledged in 15 minutes, triaged in one hour, and escalated to the on-call incident commander.
